name: Louis CH
letter:
Happy Birthday buat the one and only Evelyn Gracia Wesley!!!! (Weslie deh wkwk)

Dah tambah tua 1 tahun ni km, ngga disangka2 skrg malah udah dapet kerja di Taiwan!! muantapp, I hope you enjoy with the working life disana wkwk. Actually aku kangen jaman2 dimana kita bisa cari makan bareng sampe bingung mau makan apa n jadinya makan Indomie, masak2 nasi goreng di kamar timmy, lihat km main sama JJ, lihat km ngajarin anak2, dan masih buanyak lagi. I really do miss those moment. But lihat kamu sekarang sudah bertumbuh jauh lebih dewasa juga buat aku jadi terbakar lagi.

I pray that He expand your heart and capacity to shepherd and deeper wisdom in Word of God.

Lets have fun again in the future! See you di Taipei, Waves Camp, Surabaya, and many more places!

Dari saudara seimanmu,
Louis CH

name: Kevin RH
letter:
Dear Eve,

Happy birthday 23th birthday ve! Be blessed in everything you do. Especially in your ministry. Konco sg isa diandalkan selalu👍. Moga makin suka main pianonya bisa latihan tiap waktu. Sehat selalu lebih bugar lagi taun ini, makin diurapi lagi dan lagi ve. God bless you. Happy birthday ve!

Best,
Kevin

name: Angelique Ancilla
letter:
Happy birthday veee, grateful bisa kenal km dan tinggal deket selama setaun terakhir inii wkwkkw. First impressionku ke kamu cuma org yg wkt itu bantu pas aku didoain terima bahasa roh, never expect bisa jadi satu pemuridan dan jadi sedeket ini. Always blessed with ur presence bisa cerita", bisa tny" ke kamu. Thanks for being my "i wasn't supposed to tell anyone this but i'm telling you anyway" friend 😂 Aku gatau aku bakalan brp lama aku bakal di taiwan, but I pray we can keep supporting eo and walk tgt until we reach our calling. You have been a blessing to me in this season. Looking forward to our trip to idk where in the future

With luv, Cilla

name: Vincent Yanshyah
letter:
Happy Birthday ce eve, I bless this year where many things come to you, very grateful for you

name: Gaby
letter:
Happy 23rd birthday ce eve!
So grateful to know u and to witness your growth in Him. Bener bener melihat pekerjaan Tuhan di hidup cece ga main-main. I’m so inspired with how you followed Him, and I see how many impacts you brought into so many people. I’m so grateful to learn so many things from you, how you’re faithful in Him, faithful with His words, and faithful with His calling. Without u, I wouldn’t be here, I mean it ce, bener2 bersyukur for your obedient heart. I pray in this new age for new anointing and wisdom upon ur life, I believe whatever u do will be blessed, and that God will continue to use ur life in even greater ways. Love u always ce!

name: Aling
letter:
happy birthday eveee!!!❤️❤️❤️
keep on growing and be a blessing to others
so grateful to have youuu, love youu lotss😘❤️❣️

name: Nicholas Khang
letter: Happy birthday eve! I believe in this new age that God gave you, you will become more and more like Him in everything that you do. I can see how God uses you in the middle of us, and i believe God will use you even more and more, i pray that in this new age you will also grow even closer to God, and more faithful. I also pray for your future i believe that God have put a great purpose in your life, so keep running and follow your calling and always have faith in Him!

name: Felix
letter:
Happy Birthday Eve 🎂
Meski kita baru kenal setahun, but all the memory is very special. Let this year be a year where there will be many door opened, let no storm will bring you down, let there will be new area that is conquered.

All the best for your future.
~Felix

name: Nicholas SG
letter:
Happy birthday Beloved Eve .🎈

Strong women in God .
Has a boldness of Truth in God .

A women who has wisdom of God .

I’m so so grateful that God has placed you in this family .

Such a caring person, lovely person and have a meekness heart .

thankyou for your heart , Thankyou that you still standing with us for God.

Thankyou udh temenin koko di up and low nya koko.

I pray , in this new season God will open up new gates , new experiences that you never imagined before .

Powerful breakthrough after breakthrough in your life.

And God will use you more than anything you think .

New wine , new wisdom , new understanding, new revelations, new anointing will pour out upon you abundantly.

Let’s go walk together to build His kingdom ve .

Love you ve .

name: Cynthia
letter: HAPPY BIRTHDAY CE 😘😍, aku gak tau mau nulis apa wkwkwk tapi aku bener" bersyukur banget bisa kenal sama Cece🫶 dan hati Cece lembut banget😚

name: Friciliawe
letter:
Happiest birthday, Evelyn! 🥳✨  

cce really happy we got to talk at McD today HAHAH from talking about the bazaar’s meeting to all the random things,and deep too🙂‍↕️ it was so fun 😂 Let’s do it more often, okay?!! Jadi uuu ga magerann lgii nnti🤟🏻 

and I’m also really glad to see you growing and being part of this family together. It’s such a blessing to walk this journey side by side with you. Keep being faithful and keep growing in Christ, ya 🤍  

May this year bring you more joy, peace, and beautiful moments. You deserve all the love and happiness. Stay slayy, and never forget how special you are! 💖✨

-pecilele-
